name: Opsgenie — alerts import
description: Imports alerts from Atlassian Opsgenie (on-call alerting & incident management) via the REST API into XORCISM as security alerts (XINCIDENT.ALERT). Each Opsgenie alert becomes an ALERT (idempotent by its id); priority P1-P5 maps to severity, tags and owner are carried over. Config (worker environment variables): OPSGENIE_API_KEY (API integration key); optional OPSGENIE_EU=1 for the EU region endpoint. Offline: pass `file` = a /v2/alerts export JSON, or run with no config for the bundled sample.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.help: Maximum number of alerts to import

parameters.name: query
parameters.help: Opsgenie search query, e.g. 'status: open AND priority < P3'

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline: a saved /v2/alerts export JSON to parse instead of the live API
